top_signals.title: Bank of America taps new leaders to bridge crypto, AI and traditional finance
top_signals.summary: Sonali Theisen was named head of BofA's global digital assets platform, while Kevin Milsom was tapped to serve as head of AI transformation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India successfully launches first private orbital rocket
top_signals.summary: The takeoff marks a significant step for the South Asian giant as it eyes a bigger slice of the global space economy.
